resultList.dtldesc: Impeccably crafted 4BHK builder floor apartment is available for sale in Saket, New Delhi. If you have ever dreamt of gifting your family their dream abode then going with this property is the ultimate decision. So, why wait!!!::::Property Specification::::Advantageously positioned on the first floor of a low raised 3-storeyed building, this exquisitely designed 3BHK builder floor apartment is ideal for families with kids and elderly people as they can move around without being dependent on the lift. ::::Residents will experience the positive flow of energy here as this apartment is crafted in accordance with the vaastu norms. Moving to the configuration, this builder floor apartment comes complete with 4 bedrooms well-appointed with spacious wardrobes, 3 modish bathrooms, 3 balconies, hall, dining room, and a stylish kitchen.::::All the bathrooms are styled in western manner among which 2 are attached to 2 of the bedrooms while the remaining bathroom is given common access. ::::Overlooking the main road and service lane, the wide balconies of this flat add more grace to the overall appeal. Moreover, one of the balconies commonly adjoins the hall and a bedroom while the other balcony is connected to a bedroom and the dining room whereas the third balcony is linked with the dining room and kitchen.::::The kitchen here is a tastefully designed modular unit decked with platform sink, roomy storage cabinets, chimney, classy crockery unit, RO water system, and PNG connection. ::::Coming to the flooring, most part of the flat is flawlessly covered with marble tiles while 2 of the bedrooms feature wooden flooring. ::::Facilities::::Two covered parking spaces, regular water supply and tight security are some of the basic facilities endowed to the residents here. Also, provision is made for power backup. ::::To sort out repair issues if any, utility service providers like plumbers and electricians are just a phone call away. ::::Locality::::Residents of this property need not struggle to meet their daily needs as shopping malls; supermarket and local market are within the vicinity. Prestigious schools like Kendriya Vidyalaya and Apeejay are at a close proximity so kids need not travel too far to avail standard education.::::For any medical assistance, one can reach Max Hospital and Geetanjali Hospital which are nearby this property. Commuters can be absolutely stress-free as Saket Metro Station just needs 3mins of a walk to reach and also several other means of public transport are easily available to and from this area.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover this charming 3 BHK builder floor for sale in Duggal Colony, New Delhi. Vaastu-compliant and facing East, this residence is designed to offer a harmonious blend of natural light and positive energy, creating a welcoming and balanced living environment.::::Property Specifications ::::This expansive 3 BHK builder floor features a substantial super built-up area of 125 sq. yards and is located on the 4th floor of a 5-storeyed building. Designed with a focus on comfort and functionality, this unfurnished residence provides a blank canvas for you to customize according to your preferences.::::The property features three well-sized bedrooms, providing ample space for family living. Two of the bedrooms have private balconies, enhancing the sense of openness and offering pleasant road views. The third balcony is accessible from the living cum dining area, allowing for additional outdoor space to enjoy. The layout includes two bathrooms—one attached to a bedroom and the other common—equipped with geyser points and a mix of Indian and Western-style fittings.::::The living area seamlessly combines with the dining space, making it ideal for both daily family activities and entertaining guests. A dedicated store room adds to the practicality of the home, while the modular kitchen, complete with a piped gas connection and an attached utility area, is designed for efficiency and convenience. The flooring throughout the property is done with high-quality vitrified tiles, providing a durable and stylish finish.::::Facilities::::: Residents will benefit from open parking space and reliable water supply from both borewell and corporation sources. The property ensures an uninterrupted power supply with a 100% backup facility. Security is well-managed with a guard and CCTV surveillance, and the building includes a lift for easy access to the floor.::::Locality::::: Located in the prominent Duggal Colony, this builder floor is positioned close to essential amenities. Schools and hospitals are conveniently within a km, ensuring easy access to education and healthcare services. Nearby malls and supermarkets cater to all shopping needs, while banks and ATMs are readily accessible. Public transport options are also available nearby, enhancing connectivity and convenience for daily commuting.::
